semantic.role: Core infrastructure module providing centralized error code constants and error option type definitions for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines a canonical set of string error codes for various failure domains (CLI, runtime, publish, config).
Exports the ArchSpineErrorCode type, a union of all defined error code strings, for type-safe error handling.
Exports the ArchSpineErrorOptions interface specifying the structure for constructing structured errors.
invariants: Must remain a pure TypeScript declaration file with no side effects
Must not depend on CLI entry points or runtime modules
Error codes must be string constants usable across the codebase

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize error code definitions and error option typing to ensure consistent error handling across the system.

English.role: Core infrastructure module providing centralized error code constants and error option type definitions for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines a canonical set of string error codes for various failure domains (CLI, runtime, publish, config).
Exports the ArchSpineErrorCode type, a union of all defined error code strings, for type-safe error handling.
Exports the ArchSpineErrorOptions interface specifying the structure for constructing structured errors.

exports.name: toArchSpineError
exports.signature:
toArchSpineError(
  error: unknown,
  fallbackCode: ArchSpineErrorCode,
  fallbackMessage: string,
  options: ArchSpineErrorOptions = {},
)
